description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by landscaped greenery and several trees. The structure features a flat roof with green spaces and skylights, and large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a central backyard. The backyard is dominated by a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by a manicured lawn and outdoor seating areas. The bungalow includes multiple interconnected rooms, visible through the open layout, and several outdoor patios and terraces. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with accents of wood and glass, and the property is enclosed by low walls and lush vegetation. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat green roof, large glass windows, and a central pool surrounded by landscaped gardens and patios. The design features open, interconnected rooms and extensive outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated corner, highlighting the central pool, surrounding lawn, and the open layout of the rooms with visible patios and trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side elevation, emphasizing the flat green roof, skylights, and the linear arrangement of rooms along the length of the building.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear perspective, focusing on the pool, backyard, and the extensive glass doors opening onto the outdoor area.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side elevation, showing the pool, terraces, and the lush landscaping along the building's perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors facing the backyard
